name: lvdc-threshold
description: Low-voltage detection threshold, level encoding, and status-bit interpretation tool. emb-agent core keeps only the abstract spec and does not include any device-level LVDC implementation.
notes: This kind of tool is suitable for searching discrete threshold levels rather than simulating a power system.
Interrupt / wake-up support must be explicitly documented by an external adapter.
Vendor/chip bindings must not enter emb-agent core.
